readOnlyVerifier.contract: validate live schema and row counts for all data sources; local 500-row replica is explicit opt-in

provisioner.contract: create or repair only public synthetic demo fixtures and emit stable IDs as env/config or this public manifest

automatedDemo.retainedArtifacts: four inline demo data sources on the durable Notion page; local SQLite replicas are generated by credentialed tests and are not committed
automatedDemo.scenario: live datasource-sync verification across projects, incidents, customers, and a 500-row activity data source, each represented as its own database-ID-named <database-id>.sqlite artifact when generated locally
